title: senecio cambrensis
intro: Senecio cambrensis, also known as the Welsh groundsel, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio cambrensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from rheumatism. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk remedies to treat various health conditions.
